ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "brand_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "brand_headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that owns the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "model_price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the model */,
  "model_fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the model */,
  "model_seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the sales data was collected */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders for the car model in the state */,
  "total_products_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of products sold for the car model in the state */,
  "sales_month" TEXT /* Month of the sales data */,
  "sales_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the sales data */,
  "sales_year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sales were made */,
  "sales_promotion" TEXT /* Promotions or discounts applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "customer_referral_source" TEXT /* Source of customer referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "order_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "order_shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the market trend was observed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the market trend was observed */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend information */,
  "trend_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the market */,
  "trend_confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level in the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
